content.json:
# ☁️ Cloud Threat & Azure Anomaly
---
Monitors Azure control plane activity, service principal sign-ins, and privileged Entra operations for anomalies, misconfigurations, and attack patterns. Surfaces high-risk Azure resource changes, suspicious service principal usage, and unusual administrative activity.

content.query:
AzureActivity
| summarize
    TotalOperations = count(),
    FailedOperations = countif(ActivityStatusValue == 'Failure'),
    WriteOperations = countif(ActivityStatusValue == 'Success' and OperationNameValue has_any ('write', 'create', 'delete', 'update')),
    UniqueCallers = dcount(Caller),
    UniqueSubscriptions = dcount(SubscriptionId)
| project TotalOperations, FailedOperations, WriteOperations, UniqueCallers, UniqueSubscriptions
content.title: Azure activity summary

content.query:
AzureActivity
| summarize OperationCount = count() by CategoryValue, ActivityStatusValue
| sort by OperationCount desc
content.title: Operations by category and status

content.query:
AzureActivity
| where ActivityStatusValue == 'Failure'
| summarize FailCount = count() by Caller, OperationNameValue
| sort by FailCount desc
| take 15
content.title: Top failing operations by caller

content.query:
AzureActivity
| where ActivityStatusValue == 'Success'
| where OperationNameValue has_any (
    'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/write',
    'Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/write',
    'Microsoft.Authorization/policyAssignments/write',
    'Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/write',
    'Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/delete',
    'Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/secrets/write',
    'Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/write',
    'Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/securityRules/write',
    'Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/runCommand/action',
    'Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/write'
)
| project TimeGenerated, Caller, CallerIpAddress, OperationNameValue, ResourceGroup, _ResourceId, ActivityStatusValue
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: High-risk write operations — RBAC, Key Vault, NSG, VM run command

content.query:
AzureActivity
| where ActivityStatusValue == 'Success'
| where OperationNameValue has_any ('delete', 'Delete')
| project TimeGenerated, Caller, CallerIpAddress, OperationNameValue, ResourceGroup, _ResourceId
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Resource deletion events

content.query:
AzureActivity
| where ActivityStatusValue == 'Success'
| where Caller !endswith '@zava-corp.com'
| where isnotempty(Caller)
| where Caller !has 'Microsoft'
| summarize OperationCount = count(), Operations = make_set(OperationNameValue, 5) by Caller, CallerIpAddress
| sort by OperationCount desc
| take 20
content.title: Operations by external or service callers

content.query:
AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
| summarize
    TotalSignIns = count(),
    FailedSignIns = countif(ResultType != '0'),
    UniqueApps = dcount(AppId),
    UniqueResources = dcount(ResourceDisplayName)
| project TotalSignIns, FailedSignIns, UniqueApps, UniqueResources
content.title: Service principal sign-in summary

content.query:
AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
| where ResultType != '0'
| summarize FailCount = count() by ServicePrincipalName, AppId, ResourceDisplayName
| sort by FailCount desc
| take 15
content.title: Service principals with failed sign-ins

content.query:
AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
| where ResultType == '0'
| summarize SignInCount = count(), Resources = make_set(ResourceDisplayName, 5) by ServicePrincipalName, AppId
| sort by SignInCount desc
| take 15
content.title: Most active service principals

content.query:
AuditLogs
| where OperationName in (
    'Add member to role',
    'Remove member from role',
    'Add application',
    'Delete application',
    'Add service principal',
    'Delete service principal',
    'Add app role assignment to service principal',
    'Set federation settings on domain',
    'Set domain authentication'
)
| extend InitiatedByUPN = tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).user.userPrincipalName)
| extend InitiatedBySP = tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).app.displayName)
| extend Actor = iff(isnotempty(InitiatedByUPN), InitiatedByUPN, InitiatedBySP)
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, Actor, Result, TargetResources
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: High-risk Entra operations — role assignments, app registrations, federation changes

content.query:
AuditLogs
| where OperationName in ('Add member to role', 'Remove member from role')
| extend InitiatedByUPN = tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).user.userPrincipalName)
| extend TargetUPN = tostring(parse_json(tostring(TargetResources))[0].userPrincipalName)
| extend RoleName = tostring(parse_json(tostring(TargetResources))[0].displayName)
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, InitiatedByUPN, TargetUPN, RoleName, Result
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Directory role membership changes

content.json: ## 🔗 Cross-Layer: Azure Anomalies with Active Alerts

content.query:
let AzureCallers = AzureActivity
| where ActivityStatusValue == 'Success'
| where OperationNameValue has_any ('write', 'delete', 'action')
| summarize AzureOpCount = count(), LastAzureOp = max(TimeGenerated) by Caller = tolower(Caller);
let AlertedUsers = SecurityAlert
| where isnotempty(CompromisedEntity)
| summarize AlertCount = count(), AlertSeverity = max(AlertSeverity) by Caller = tolower(CompromisedEntity);
AzureCallers
| join kind=leftouter AlertedUsers on Caller
| project Caller, AzureOpCount, LastAzureOp, AlertCount = coalesce(AlertCount, 0), AlertSeverity = coalesce(AlertSeverity, 'None')
| sort by AlertCount desc, AzureOpCount desc
| take 20
content.title: Azure callers who also have active security alerts — potential compromised admin
